name: clawcast
description: Turns what your Claude Code agents build into a daily two-host podcast. A SessionEnd + debounced Stop hook generate your episode locally and ship ONLY the finished script (never raw transcripts) to clawcast.fm.

token.title: Clawcast token
token.description: Your ingest token from https://clawcast.fm (sign in → connect). Stored in your OS keychain.

engine.title: Generation engine
engine.description: Which already-authenticated CLI writes your script: 'claude' or 'codex'. Sets the initial engine; change anytime at clawcast.fm/settings.
